message:
feat(robot,events): attention feed digest engine with conflict event types

Two major additions to the attention infrastructure:

Digest Engine (internal/robot/attention_feed.go, attention_feed_test.go):
- BuildAttentionDigest() reduces replayed events into a compact,
  token-efficient summary with three urgency buckets: action_required,
  interesting, background (configurable limits: 5/4/3 default)
- Five suppression strategies: heartbeat noise, pane output bursts
  (coalesced per pane), lifecycle noise (attach/detach/resize),
  duplicate alerts (grouped by type+session+pane+summary), bucket
  overflow
- Coalescing: repeated events of same group key merged into single
  representative (highest-severity/newest), annotated with
  source_event_count and suppressed_count
- Deterministic trace mode (IncludeTrace) records surface/coalesce/
  suppress decisions per event for test diagnostics
- Digest(sinceCursor, opts) wraps Replay + BuildAttentionDigest
- PeekAttentionFeed() returns global feed without creating one
- PublishMailPending() and PublishMailAckRequired() for mail-related
  attention signals with appropriate actionability and NextAction
- Tests: pane output burst coalescing, lifecycle + duplicate
  suppression, cursor boundary preservation, summary stability,
  bucket assignment, 4000-event burst benchmark

Conflict Events (internal/events/bus.go, bus_test.go):
- ReservationConflictEvent (conflict.reservation): Path, RequestorAgent,
  RequestorPane, Holders
- FileConflictEvent (conflict.file): Path, Agents
- Attention feed normalizes these into EventCategoryFile /
  EventTypeFileConflict with ActionabilityActionRequired /
  SeverityWarning plus NextAction suggestions for robot-locks and
  robot-diff
- Tests: field correctness, BusEvent compliance, publish/subscribe,
  history retention, JSON marshaling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
